layout_note: Transposed spreadsheet-style Schedule A attachment (footer 'MS ARECO Schedule A 12.31.16'): assets run as columns, buckets as rows down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Value of Asset A: None through L: Over $50,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000; Type of Income None/Dividends/Rent/Interest/Capital Gains/Excepted/Blind Trust/Tax-Deferred/Other Type of Income; Amount of Income: Current Year A: None through K: Over $5,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Income over $1,000,000; Amount of Income: Preceding Year January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016, same buckets). Selections are black-filled cells; one row emitted per asset column. EIF row blank for all columns.
free_text: Header: 'Name: Rohit Khanna', 'Page ___ of ___' (blank). Value of Asset 'A: None' filled across all three columns. Type of Income: Dividends and Capital Gains filled for all three columns.
